title: SHAVE! THAT! ZIGZAGOON!
description: Allows you to shear the Base and Galarian forms of Zigzagoon in Cobblemon using Shearems, make new items with their fur!
body:
## **Installation VIA Data Pack for v1.0 and v1.1**

Add-on for the [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) Mod and requires [Shearems](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-shearems) and [Cobblemon Drop Loot Tables](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-droploottables)

In order to use this add-on you **MUST** place the .zip of the version you've chosen inside both the **_Resource Pack_** and **_Data Pack_** folders of your game/world file

⚠️[Shearems](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-shearems) and [Cobblemon Drop Loot Tables](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-droploottables) seem to be Fabric Mods exclusively at the time of writing this **_19/8/2025_** and so this pack will likely __NOT__ work on **NeoForge** versions

## Features / Important Changes in v2.0

Using shears on either **Base** or **Galarian** Zigzagoon will shave them and drop the following:
- Base: 1 - 3 Zigzagoon Fur
- Galarian: 1 - 3 Galarian Zigzagoon Fur

these <Fur> drops can be used to craft Zigzagoon <Fur Blocks> and <Fur Carpets>
<details>
<summary>Recipes</summary>

- 4x <Fur> -> Block of the same <Fur> type
- 2x <Fur Block> -> Carpet of the <Fur Block> type
- 1x <Regular Fur> + Glowstone Dust -> <Shiny Fur>
- 3x <Fur> + Leather Helmet + 2x Leather -> <Fur Hat>

Each type of Fur block can be converted into a related Wool block...
- Regular -> Brown
- Shiny Regular -> Orange
- Galar -> Black
- Shiny Galar -> Red
- Galar `XOR` Shiny Galar -> White

</details>


<details>
<summary>Commands & Technical</summary>

The mods namespace is <zigzagfur> so write commands as such...

```
/give @s zigzagfur:zigzag_fur_block_hat
```

I apologize in advance for the mess of name formatting for the items lol

</details>


<details>
<summary>License</summary>

You're free to: 
- Add this pack to your Modpacks as long as you set it as an "Embedded" dependancy in each version it's included in
- Record videos or livestream with the pack without providing links or attribution

</details>

because of how [Shearems](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-shearems) works Zigzagoons will now eat grass off a grass block leaving behind a dirt block like a Sheep would, this is to regrow their fur
